message:
fix: handle TMPDIR shell default value syntax in safe path detection

The safe path detection was not recognizing the shell default value
syntax ${TMPDIR:-/tmp} and ${TMPDIR:-/var/tmp}. These patterns are
commonly used in shell scripts to provide a fallback to /tmp when
TMPDIR is not set, and should be allowed since they always expand
to a safe temp directory.

Fixed by adding checks for these patterns in both path_is_safe_unquoted
and path_is_safe_double_quoted functions.

Fixes golden isomorphism test failure for recursive deletion with
TMPDIR default value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
